howItWorks.intro: This travel packing weight calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Total Weight
rules.formula: Total = Clothing + Shoes + Toiletries + Electronics + Misc + Bag Weight
rules.explanation: Sum of all item weights plus the empty bag weight compared against airline limits.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: How much does a typical outfit weigh?
faq.a: A casual outfit (shirt, pants, underwear, socks) averages about 1.5-2 lbs. Heavy items like jeans and sweaters add more.

faq.q: What is the heaviest item in most luggage?
faq.a: Shoes are usually the heaviest per-item. Wearing your bulkiest shoes on the plane saves significant bag weight.
